fields.name: flags
fields.note: bit 1: invulnerable, bit 2: flying, bit 4: may fly, bit 8: instabuild (creative)
switch on filterMask
one section per action in the set, in ordinal order

fields.name: sectionPos
fields.note: packed section coordinates: x (22 bits) | z (22 bits) | y (20 bits)

fields.name: blocks
fields.note: repeated 'count' times; packed: block state id << 12 | (x << 8 | z << 4 | y) within the section

fields.name: packedItems
fields.note: repeated until index = 255

fields.name: index
fields.note: 255 = end of list, nothing follows

fields.name: serializerType
fields.note: entity data serializer id

fields.name: value
fields.note: format depends on the serializer

fields.name: slots
fields.note: repeated while the slot byte has its high bit set

fields.name: slot
fields.note: bits 0-6 = slot id, bit 7 = another entry follows
switch on the preceding byte

fields.name: format
fields.note: number format type: 0 = blank, 1 = styled, 2 = fixed
styled: a style compound; fixed: a text component; blank: nothing follows
switch on the preceding byte
switch on the preceding byte

fields.name: flags
fields.note: bit 1: a background follows, bit 2: show toast, bit 4: hidden

fields.name: background
fields.note: only present when bit 1 of flags is set

Vec3 (lp).note: low-precision vector, quantized into a 48-bit pack

fields.name: packedLow
fields.note: 0 = zero vector, nothing follows. Bits 0-1: scale, bit 2: extended scale follows

fields.name: packedHigh
fields.note: the three bytes+int form a 48-bit pack (low to high); bits 3-17, 18-32, 33-47 are x, y, z as 15-bit values in [-1, 1], each multiplied by the scale

fields.name: extendedScale
fields.note: only when bit 2 of the first byte is set: scale |= value << 2

fields.name: count
fields.note: 0 or less = empty ItemStack, nothing follows

fields.name: addedComponents
fields.note: repeated 'added' times
